Elevate your events with our exquisite paan

Paanstation brings a flavorful twist to your celebrations with live paan counters that delight every guest.

We create unforgettable experiences with our live paan stations for

At Paanstation, we specialize in creating unforgettable experiences with our live paan stations for parties, get-togethers, and weddings. Elevate your events with a touch of tradition and flair! Our expert team crafts personalized paan offerings, ensuring your guests enjoy a unique and delightful experience.

What our clients are saying

“We ordered Paan for my father-in-law’s birthday party and delivery was on point! We tried all of the flavors, they were phenomenal; but stuck to one flavor for the event. This is by far the best paan and was thoroughly enjoyed by everyone! I can’t believe we didn’t know this gem of a place existed until now. I’m sure there will be many more family gatherings with Paan Station on the menu!”

H P

"Paan station, a family owned and operated small business (by Parag and Kajal) is carving a name in the business slowly and steadily over last couple of years. Our most favorite dish is “Paan”, a delicacy from India served post lunch or dinner. Paan making is an art, right from choosing fresh ingredients to adding the exact proportion. The paan from this business is the best paan you will find anywhere in Jersey. Fresh, juicy and delicious. I highly recommend Paan Station to anyone who want relish this Indian delicacy."

Nimisha Sakpal

"One of the best pans in NJ . I ordered pan from them for a party at my place . Every pan was made with fresh leaf and the flavor was truly awesome . They also did the home delivery exactly on time . Everyone at the party loved the pans . Highly recommended for gatherings at house !!"

Anupam Saha

"Indian Paan station in Central New Jersey offers an exquisite range of sweet pans with delightful flavors like Betel Leaf, cherry and dates. Enjoying their paan has become a cherished weekend ritual, thanks to their excellent service and fresh ingredients. Our community parties are never complete without paan from this establishment. The Betel leaf are so fresh and can't find them anywhere else in NJ Pan service providers. They also offer a variety of services, including delivery to local restaurants and live stations, making them a beloved part of our celebrations. Highly recommended!"

Santosh Lad

"This is a pan lover's paradise, but if you're not a big fan, I recommend giving it a shot. The delicious pan here will compel your taste buds to swoon. They have an enormous variety, and each variety makes you want more of them."

Dipendra Ghosh

"One of the best places in NJ to enjoy paan varieties, for my paan catering needs, I get my orders from Paan Station and would highly recommend to all Paan Lovers"

Ashutosh Thakur

History

Here’s a brief history of paan in India
Ancient Origins

Paan has roots dating back over 2,000 years, mentioned in ancient texts like the Vedas and in the works of various poets.

Cultural Significance

Traditionally associated with hospitality, it has been offered to guests and is a symbol of respect and warmth in Indian culture.

Regional Variations

Different regions in India have their own unique styles of Paan, such as Banarasi Paan, Calcutta Paan, and more, each with distinct flavors.

Medicinal Use

Historically, Paan has been used for its digestive properties and is believed to have various health benefits, such as aiding digestion.

Royal Associations

Paan has been enjoyed by royalty and has been a part of elaborate rituals and celebrations, symbolizing luxury and indulgence.

Modern Adaptations

In contemporary times, Paan has evolved, with variations like chocolate Paan and ice cream Paan gaining popularity, appealing to younger generations.
